since_last: 63% of 101 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.61%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 63% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.19% · BTC +1.96% · Gold +1.43% · Nasdaq100 +0.04%. 63% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.61%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.61%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.78%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at +5.70%
cards.body: Leaders: TER +5.70%, LRCX +5.65%, MU +5.57%, SKHY +5.42%, INTC +5.17%. Laggards: ADBE -4.89%, CHKP -4.72%, WDAY -4.45%, INTU -4.36%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.69% at $121.88
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.69% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
